projectDescription: Runtime authorization for AI agents — evaluates every tool call against your policies and decides allow, deny, or escalate in under 10ms.
keyFeatures: Per-action runtime authorization for every AI agent tool call
Policy engine with tool allowlist, denylist, parameter constraints, rate limiting, and time-based rules
Default-deny posture: no matching policy means blocked
Sub-10ms authorization checks at the edge (Cloudflare Workers)
MCP-native middleware — drop-in integration for Model Context Protocol servers
Full audit trail of every authorization decision
Multi-tenant workspaces with scoped API keys
Node.js and Python SDKs with typed clients
publicApiSurface: VetoClient (Node.js) — authorize(), createAgent(), listAgents(), getAgent(), deleteAgent(), createPolicy(), listPolicies(), getPolicy(), updatePolicy(), deletePolicy(), queryAuditLog()

VetoClient / AsyncVetoClient (Python) — authorize(), create_agent(), list_agents(), get_agent(), delete_agent(), create_policy(), list_policies(), get_policy(), update_policy(), delete_policy(), query_audit_log()
